---
id: archived-builds-list
title: "List 1000 archived builds of an app"
description: "List the first 1000 archived builds of a specified Bitrise app. Set parameters to filter builds:"
sidebar_label: "List 1000 archived builds of an app"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api:

---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"List 1000 archived builds of an app"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/apps/{app-slug}/archived-builds"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



List the first 1000 archived builds of a specified <NT>Bitrise</NT> app. Set parameters to filter builds:
